notes: Small file (120 lines, 5 declarations) formalizing Silverman II.2.1: every rational map from a smooth plane curve is a morphism. The main proof (isRegularAt_of_smooth, 45 lines) uses Finset.exists_min_image to find the minimizing component index and Uniformizer.exists_ord_P_eq to produce a normalizing scalar; no sorry, no set_option maxHeartbeats. No mathlib duplication suspected — the result is specific to the project's SmoothPlaneCurve/FunctionField setup.
